title: Fresh deadline assigned on re-queue extends packet lifetime
description:
File: python/src/lichen/link/link_layer.py:316

When a packet is re-queued after CAD failure, push() is called without deadline_ms, causing a fresh deadline to be computed:

    self.tx_queue.push(frame_bytes, priority=Priority.ROUTING)

A packet that was 50ms from expiry gets a fresh 5000ms deadline (ROUTING default). This defeats the deadline-based expiry mechanism designed to prevent bufferbloat.

Fix: Track original deadline and pass it to re-queue, or compute remaining time from original deadline.
close_reason: Fixed re-queue deadline preservation in TxQueue by adding TxReservation and reserve/complete methods that keep original absolute deadline_ms on CAD/TX failure requeues. Updated push to support reservations. Tests and lint pass. Commit 0edaf85
